groups.name: Operations
groups.description: The operations committee is responsible for handling background tasks which are necessary for the club to continue serving its members and the community.

leads.name: Saishri Bagde
leads.description: The industrial relations committee seeks out sponsors and connects members with companies.

leads.name: Jonathon Reilly
leads.description: The infrastructure committee is responsible for maintaining the club’s websites, servers, and cloud-based resources.

leads.name: Tarakanath Peddi
leads.description: The accounting committee oversees the finances of IEEE and the technical committees.

groups.name: Member Involvement
groups.description: The goal of the three member involvement committees is to attract new members and keep them motivated and active in IEEE.

leads.name: Su Park
leads.description: The events committee’s job is to organize, plan, and execute club-wide and campus wide events for IEEE, including general meetings and outreach events.

leads.name: Soumil Verma
leads.description: The learning committee is responsible for setting up workshops for students to help them with skills they might not otherwise have opportunities to develop.

leads.name: Shidan Wan
leads.description: The public relations committee is tasked with maintaining the club’s social media presence and engaging in campus outreach.
